title: POLICY block content
description: Carries post-classification policy for a category — which PII scans run, which metadata schemas extract, which governance policies enforce. Per architecture §3 / CSV #35. The in-engine interpreter (CSV #37 Option A) reads this block after the classifier and dispatches the corresponding stage-④ work.

categoryId.description: Taxonomy category this policy applies to. Each category gets one POLICY block; the engine resolves by `categoryId == result.categoryId` after classification.

categoryName.description: Optional human-readable category name; the admin UI surfaces this without joining to the taxonomy collection.

requiredScans.description: References to `PiiTypeDefinition` keys (or block ids of PROMPT-shaped scans) that MUST run for documents in this category. Engine dispatches each via the cascade router.

scanType.description: Scan family. PII / PHI / PCI gate downstream redaction policies; CUSTOM is operator-defined.

ref.description: Either a `PiiTypeDefinition.key` or a PROMPT block id, depending on `scanType`.

blocking.description: If true, scan failure stops the pipeline (the document doesn't progress to enforcement). If false, scan failure is logged + recorded in audit but the pipeline continues.

metadataSchemaIds.description: Ordered references to `MetadataSchema` documents whose extracted-metadata fields the engine populates after classification. Each schema runs as a follow-up LLM call via the cascade router (with the schema's prompt).

governancePolicyIds.description: References to `GovernancePolicy` documents (storage tier, retention schedule, access controls) that apply to this category. Engine hands them to `gls-enforcement-worker` after scans + metadata extraction succeed.

conditions.description: Optional per-condition overrides. The engine evaluates each entry against the classification result; the first match's `apply` block overlays the top-level `requiredScans` / `metadataSchemaIds` / `governancePolicyIds`.

bySensitivity.description: Override slot triggered when the classification's sensitivity matches the listed values. Useful for `RESTRICTED` documents in this category needing stricter scans than the default.
